name: Sarah M.
quote: Before working with DigiLift, we had no idea which leads were coming from where or why so many inquiries went cold. Now our follow-up is automatic and we can actually see which campaigns are working.
results: Improved lead tracking and automated follow-up workflows

name: Marcus T.
quote: The audit alone was worth it. We found out we were losing leads in the follow-up step — not the ads. Once that was fixed, our tour bookings went up without spending more on advertising.
results: Identified follow-up gap, increased tour bookings

name: Priya K.
quote: The lead funnel DigiLift built for us routes every inquiry straight into our Google Sheet, sends an automatic follow-up, and flags leads that haven't responded. It saves us hours every week.
results: Automated lead routing and follow-up, reduced manual work

name: Jennifer R.
quote: I was skeptical about AI tools being relevant to a small preschool. But the system DigiLift set up is practical, not complicated — it just works in the background and makes our enrollment process smoother.
results: Streamlined enrollment process, better lead quality

name: Seeds Academy
quote: Case study in progress. Meta Lead Ads campaign launched with instant form qualification, Google Sheets lead routing, and automated follow-up workflows.
results: Meta Ads · Google Sheets routing · Automated follow-up · Lead qualification
